text:
BOTTOM LINE — Tech-led resilience amid yield spike, semis soared. AI strength in XLK (+3.44%) and Semi 7 (+6.68%) offset Dow (-0.63%) plunge from oil surge and 10Y yield +0.83% to 4.39%. Geopolitical oil bets ($7B) fueled inflation fears, capping breadth as RSP lagged SPY by 4.77pp over 20d.

INDICES — VIX 17.2 down. QQQ +2.34%, SPY +0.83%, IWM +0.68%, DIA +0.04%. Large > small by 1.66pp. 10Y yield +0.83% to 4.39% most notable.

VOLUME — QQQ vol 1.1x + price up signals accumulation; SPY vol unnoted but IJH/RSP 1.0x + modest gains show low-conviction broad rally. XLK/XLV 1.1x elevated amid gains = accumulation; XLE/XLI 0.7x ignored on downside = distribution light.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +3.44%, XLB Materials +0.37%, XLY Discretionary +0.27%, XLP Staples +0.24%, XLRE Real Estate +0.02%, XLC Comms -0.37%, XLE Energy -0.45%, XLI Industrials -0.46%, XLF Financials -0.60%, XLV Healthcare -0.85%, XLU Utilities -0.89%. Top industries SOXX +5.67%, SMH +4.90%; bottom IHI -1.98%, XHE -2.03%.

THE 7s — Top5: Semi +6.68% (NVDA strongest, INTC weakest), Fab +5.16% (MU strongest, INTC weakest), Old Metals +3.18%, Mag +0.94%, New Metals +0.78%. Bot5: Cloud -3.55% (NET weakest, SNOW strongest), Medtech -2.62%, Power -1.32%, Toll Road -1.19%, Buildout -1.03%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Hawk(6)-Neutral(5)-Dove(4) tally. USD stress 25/100 (Calm), Reserve Scarcity 85th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR 1.15, QQQ 1.48 elevated = protection demand; QQQ skew +7.3% = put fear. SPY near GEX flip 736.0. VIX 17.2 below 20d MA 18.1 = complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil -1.02% on Iran bets dragged XLE -0.45% despite prior +3.5% week; yield +0.83% pressured defensives as XLU -0.89%.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 58.4/100 neutral. Top movers MU +15.44% semis, DDOG +31% cloud (AI blowout), NET -23.62% cloud. 20d momentum: XLK +23.07% best sector, Semi +50.48% best basket. NET vol 4.2x + price down = distribution.

WATCH — MU +15.44%, vol spike + AI memory demand. NET -23.62%, 4.2x vol distribution in Cloud 7. SOXX +5.67%, semi momentum break vs chip retreat.
